overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3: Blood and Wine showing Geralt of Rivia exploring the sunlit palace grounds of Beauclair in Toussaint. The character ascends covered stone stairways, emerges onto open terraces with sea views, and enters darker interior courtyards with magical purple ambient lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stone stairway with Gothic arches

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking up wide stone stairs through a covered palace passageway with yellow stone walls

notable_agents.action: guard standing near the top of the stairs watching the approach

entered.detail: wide stone steps ascending through a covered passage with dappled sunlight
tall palace walls with decorative vertical moldings and warm golden color
tall palace walls with climbing green vines
ornate black metal gate at the top of the staircase
Gothic stone archway forming the ceiling of the corridor

segments.scene_description: Geralt ascends a covered stone staircase within the palace walls. The narrow passage features warm yellow stone walls with decorative moldings and climbing vines, while wrought iron gates mark the transition ahead. Light filters through openings creating dappled shadows on the steps.

scene_state.functional_zone: open seaside terrace with Gothic ornamental structures

events.description: exiting covered archway into bright open terrace with panoramic sea view

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the sunlit terrace toward elaborate Gothic arches overlooking the ocean

notable_agents.action: woman in a long dress walking along the terrace railing

entered.detail: elaborate stone archway with pointed spires and decorative tracery framing the sea view
bright turquoise ocean visible through the archway with distant horizon
decorative stone railing with carved details along the terrace edge
tall pointed spires of the palace buildings with red roofs
planters with vibrant red flowers lining the terrace

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered passage, the scene opens onto a sunlit terrace with panoramic sea views. An ornate Gothic archway frames the turquoise ocean while red flower beds line the path. Geralt walks forward past scattered pedestrians toward the decorative balustrade overlooking the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: palace courtyard with terraced gardens and Gothic architecture

events.description: turning right to enter the main palace courtyard area

agents.ego_description: Geralt turning right and walking through the palace courtyard passing guards and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: armored guard with shield patrolling the courtyard
child running across the courtyard path

entered.detail: multi-story Gothic palace facade with arched windows and red awnings
mature leafy tree providing shade in the courtyard center
decorative fountain structure in the courtyard plaza

segments.scene_description: Geralt turns right into a spacious palace courtyard surrounded by Gothic buildings with red roofs and arched windows. A large tree and stone fountain occupy the center while armored guards and a child move through the space. The architecture features ornate stonework and climbing vines on the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway approaching palace interior entrance

events.description: entering darker covered area as sunlight is blocked by overhead stone structures

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking toward a dark archway entrance flanked by burning torch braziers

notable_agents.action: guard standing watch near the dark entrance archway

entered.detail: stone walls covered in dense green ivy and red flowering plants
iron stand with burning flames providing warm light
shadowed Gothic entrance leading into the palace interior
flight of wide steps leading upward into the covered building

segments.scene_description: Approaching the palace interior, Geralt walks along a covered walkway with vine-covered walls and burning torch braziers. The lighting shifts from bright sunlight to shadow as he nears a dark Gothic archway entrance with stairs leading upward into the building.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior courtyard with magical purple ambient lighting

events.description: entering area with distinctive purple glowing plants and dim torchlight creating magical atmosphere

agents.ego_description: Geralt ascending stairs into a dimly lit interior courtyard with glowing purple vegetation and ornate stonework

entered.detail: magical luminescent purple foliage lining the courtyard walls
magical luminescent purple foliage lining the courtyard walls
decorative stone pavilion with columns in the courtyard center
burning torch on an iron stand providing warm orange light

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters a magical interior courtyard illuminated by torchlight and glowing purple vegetation. The space features an ornate stone pavilion at its center and decorative columns, with the purple ambient light creating a mystical atmosphere distinct from the sunlit exterior.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional corridor between interior and exterior

events.description: Geralt turns around and begins walking back toward the sunlit exit

agents.ego_description: Geralt turning around and walking back out of the dark courtyard toward the bright sunlit archway

entered.detail: bright exit archway leading back to the sunlit exterior courtyard

segments.scene_description: After reaching the interior courtyard, Geralt turns around and walks back toward the sunlit exit. The camera follows as he moves away from the purple-glowing interior back through the transitional corridor toward the bright archway leading outside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the sun-drenched exterior of a palace to a mystical, purple-lit interior before returning to the light. It begins with Geralt ascending a narrow, vine-covered stone staircase where dappled shadows fall across decorative moldings, before emerging through wrought iron gates onto a bright terrace overlooking a turquoise sea. The scene then expands into a spacious Gothic courtyard filled with red-roofed buildings and stone fountains, eventually shifting toward shadow as the camera follows Geralt along a torch-lit walkway. This progression leads into a magical interior courtyard defined by glowing purple vegetation and an ornate stone pavilion, creating a mystical atmosphere that contrasts with the previous sunlight. Finally, the camera tracks Geralt as he turns away from the purple glow, retracing his steps through the transitional corridor and back toward the bright archway of the exterior.
